api/PDFSolid_Conversion.Common.ErrorCode.title: Enum ErrorCode | PDFSolid Conversion SDK
api/PDFSolid_Conversion.Common.ErrorCode.summary: Enum ErrorCode Enumeration for error code. Namespace: PDFSolid_Conversion.Common Assembly: cpdfconversionsdk_dotnet.dll Syntax public enum ErrorCode Fields Name Description e_ErrCancel Cancel conversion. e_ErrCompress Folder compression failed. e_ErrConverting Currently executing conversion task. e_ErrExpire The resource (e.g., license, token) has expired. e_ErrFile File cannot be found or could not be opened. e_ErrIO System IO error occurs. e_ErrImageDataEmpty The image data is empty or not provided. e_ErrImageInvalid The image is invalid or corrupted. e_ErrImageUnsupportedFormat The image format is not supported (e.g., not RGB, YUV, etc.). e_ErrImageWHError The image width or height is invalid (e.g., less than or equal to zero). e_ErrInvalidArg Invalid argument provided. e_ErrInvalidHandle The handle is invalid, possibly uninitialized or already released. e_ErrInvalidTable The table data is invalid or null. e_ErrLibraryNotLoad Current library has not been loaded yet. e_ErrLicenseExpire The license has expired. e_ErrLicenseFileReadFailed Failed to read license file. e_ErrLicenseIllegalAccess Illegal access to the API interface. e_ErrLicenseInvalid The license is invalid. e_ErrLicenseMismatch The license does not match the device, module, or version. e_ErrLicenseOCRPermissionDeny The license does not have OCR permissions. e_ErrLicensePermissionDeny The license does not have the function permission. e_ErrLicenseUninitialized License has not been initialized. e_ErrLicenseUnsupportedAPI The current license does not support calling this API. e_ErrLicenseUnsupportedDevice The license does not support the device id. e_ErrLicenseUnsupportedID The license does not support the application id. e_ErrLicenseUnsupportedPlatform The license does not support the current platform. e_ErrMissingArg A required argument is missing. e_ErrModelFormatUnsupported The model format is not supported by this system or SDK. e_ErrModelFunctionUnsupported The model does not support the requested function or operation. e_ErrModelInvalidFormat The model file format is invalid or corrupted. e_ErrModelSDKMismatch The model is incompatible with the current SDK version. e_ErrNoTable There are no tables in the PDF document. e_ErrOCRFailure OCR recognition failed. e_ErrOutOfMemory Out-of-memory error occurs. e_ErrPDFFormat Format is invalid. For files, this may also mean that file is corrupted. e_ErrPDFPage PDF page not found or content error. e_ErrPDFPassword Invalid password. Usually, this error may occur when loading a PDF document with password. When meet this, user should load document again with correct password. e_ErrPDFSecurity PDF document is encrypted by some unsupported security handler. e_ErrSuccess Success, and no error occurs. e_ErrUnknown Any unknown error occurs.

api/PDFSolid_Conversion.Common.HtmlPageO.title: Enum HtmlPageOption | PDFSolid Conversion SDK
api/PDFSolid_Conversion.Common.HtmlPageO.summary: Enum HtmlPageOption Html page option. Namespace: PDFSolid_Conversion.Common Assembly: cpdfconversionsdk_dotnet.dll Syntax public enum HtmlPageOption Fields Name Description e_MultiPage Convert the PDF file into multiple HTML files. e_MultiPageWithBookmark Convert the PDF file into multiple HTML files. Each HTML file corresponds to a PDF page, and users can navigate to the next HTML file via a link at the bottom of the HTML page. e_SinglePage Convert the entire PDF file into a single HTML file. e_SinglePageWithBookmark Convert the PDF file into a single HTML file with an outline for navigation at the beginning of the HTML page.

api/PDFSolid_Conversion.Common.LibraryMa.title: Class LibraryManager | PDFSolid Conversion SDK
api/PDFSolid_Conversion.Common.LibraryMa.summary: Class LibraryManager. Provides public library management APIs for initializing and releasing the conversion library. Methods include InitLibrary, Initialize, LicenseVerify, SetDocumentAIModel, SetDocumentAIModelCount, ReleaseDocumentAIModel, GetPageCount, GetVersion, and Release. SetDocumentAIModel loads the DocumentAI model used by OCR, layout analysis, and table recognition. ReleaseDocumentAIModel releases the loaded DocumentAI model.
